'''Claine''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the uncle of [[Callista Ming]]. He lived on an ark on [[Chad/Legends|Chad]] with Callista and her father.

==Appearances==
*[[Children of the Jedi (novel)|''Children of the Jedi'']] {{1stm}}
